memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: XHdcp_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to EEPROM.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: XHdcp_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to EEPROM.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

briefdescription.para: This function rounds the length to a 16 bytes boundary.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This function decrypts the HDCP keys.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This function gets a HDCP array from the eeprom.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read. A value less than the specified input value indicates an error.

briefdescription.para: This function reads a number of bytes from the IIC serial EEPROM into a specified buffer.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address in the EEPROM to read from.
contains the address of the data buffer to be filled.
contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be read. This value is not constrained by the page size of the device such that up to 64K may be read in one call.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read. A value less than the specified input value indicates an error.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the password from the uart.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 *Hdcp22Lc128, u32 Hdcp22Lc128Size, u8 *Hdcp22RxPrivateKey, u32 Hdcp22RxPrivateKeySize, u8 *Hdcp14KeyA, u32 Hdcp14KeyASize, u8 *Hdcp14KeyB, u32 Hdcp14KeyBSize)
memberdef.name: XHdcp_LoadKeys

briefdescription.para: This function loads the HDCP keys from the eeprom.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This function initialize the HDCP 1.4 key manager.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if action was not successful

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilinx HDCP key loading utility implementation as used in the HDMI example design.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xhdmi_hdcp_keys.h for more details.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 MG 26-01-2016 Initial release 1.1 YH 04-08-2016 Bypass HDCP Key password for VIPER run in board farm 1.2 GM 12-07-2017 Changed printf usage to xil_printf Changed "\n\r" in xil_printf calls to "\r\n"
